texts.title: 回到過去
texts.description: Jay Chou - Hui dao guo qu

lines.hanzi: 一盞黃黃舊舊的燈 時間在旁悶不吭聲
lines.pinyin: yi zhan huang huang jiu jiu de deng shi jian zai pang men bu keng sheng
lines.translation: A dim, old yellow lamp, while time stays silent beside it

lines.hanzi: 寂寞下手毫無分寸 不懂得輕重之分
lines.pinyin: ji mo xia shou hao wu fen cun bu dong de qing zhong zhi fen
lines.translation: Loneliness strikes without restraint, not knowing any sense of measure

lines.hanzi: 沉默支撐躍過陌生 靜靜看著凌晨黃昏
lines.pinyin: chen mo zhi cheng yue guo mo sheng jing jing kan zhe ling chen huang hun
lines.translation: Silence supports me as I leap over unfamiliarity, quietly watching dawn and dusk

lines.hanzi: 妳的身影 失去平衡 慢慢下沉
lines.pinyin: ni de shen ying shi qu ping heng man man xia chen
lines.translation: Your silhouette loses balance and slowly sinks

lines.hanzi: 黑暗已在空中盤旋 該往哪我看不見
lines.pinyin: hei an yi zai kong zhong pan xuan gai wang na wo kan bu jian
lines.translation: Darkness circles in the air; I can’t see where to go

lines.hanzi: 也許愛在夢的另一端
lines.pinyin: ye xu ai zai meng de ling yi duan
lines.translation: Maybe love exists on the other side of dreams

lines.hanzi: 無法存活在真實的空間
lines.pinyin: wu fa cun huo zai zhen shi de kong jian
lines.translation: Unable to survive in the real world

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去 試著抱妳在懷裡
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu shi zhe bao ni zai huai li
lines.translation: I want to return to the past, try to hold you in my arms

lines.hanzi: 羞怯的臉帶有一點稚氣
lines.pinyin: xiu qie de lian dai you yi dian zhi qi
lines.translation: Your shy face still carrying a bit of innocence

lines.hanzi: 想看妳看的世界，想在妳夢的畫面
lines.pinyin: xiang kan ni kan de shi jie xiang zai ni meng de hua mian
lines.translation: I want to see the world you see, to be inside your dream scenes

lines.hanzi: 只要靠在一起就能感覺甜蜜
lines.pinyin: zhi yao kao zai yi qi jiu neng gan jue tian mi
lines.translation: Just being close together is enough to feel sweetness

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去 試著讓故事繼續
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu shi zhe rang gu shi ji xu
lines.translation: I want to return to the past and try to let the story continue

lines.hanzi: 至少不再讓妳離我而去
lines.pinyin: zhi shao bu zai rang ni li wo er qu
lines.translation: At least I wouldn’t let you leave me again

lines.hanzi: 分散時間的注意 這次會抱得更緊
lines.pinyin: fen san shi jian de zhu yi zhe ci hui bao de geng jin
lines.translation: I’ll distract time this time, and hold you even tighter

lines.hanzi: 這樣挽留不知還來不來得及 想回到過去
lines.pinyin: zhe yang wan liu bu zhi hai lai bu lai de ji xiang hui dao guo qu
lines.translation: I don’t know if holding on like this is still in time—I want to go back to the past

lines.hanzi: 思緒不斷阻擋著回憶播放
lines.pinyin: si xu bu duan zu dang zhe hui yi bo fang
lines.translation: My thoughts keep blocking the replay of memories

lines.hanzi: 盲目的追尋仍然空空盪盪
lines.pinyin: mang mu de zhui xun reng ran kong kong dang dang
lines.translation: Blind searching still leaves me empty

lines.hanzi: 灰濛濛的夜晚睡意又不知躲到哪去
lines.pinyin: hui meng meng de ye wan shui yi you bu zhi duo dao na qu
lines.translation: On this dim night, sleep has nowhere to be found

lines.hanzi: 一轉身孤單已躺在身旁
lines.pinyin: yi zhuan shen gu dan yi tang zai shen pang
lines.translation: As I turn around, loneliness is already lying beside me

lines.hanzi: 沉默支撐躍過陌生 靜靜看著凌晨黃昏
lines.pinyin: chen mo zhi cheng yue guo mo sheng jing jing kan zhe ling chen huang hun
lines.translation: Silence supports me as I cross the unfamiliar, quietly watching dawn and dusk

lines.hanzi: 妳的身影 失去平衡 慢慢下沉
lines.pinyin: ni de shen ying shi qu ping heng man man xia chen
lines.translation: Your silhouette loses balance and slowly sinks

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu
lines.translation: I want to go back to the past
